reference: Under my ribs on the right side is hurting when I breathe, cough, or even clear my throat. I got choked on some meat Wednesday night, and this right side has hurt since, but it has been worse today. I had to leave work at nine a.m. this morning. I don't know if it is the spleen or if I have cracked a rib when I was coughing so hard while choking.
text: But if my brain's on the right side is hurting, or I can breathe, cough, or even clear my throat— I got choked on some heat Wednesday night, and this right side has hurt since, but it has been worse today. I had to leave work at 9:00 a.m. this morning, and I don't know if it is the screen or if I had cracked a rib when I was coughing so hard while choking.
